---
output:
  github_document:
    toc: true
    toc_depth : 3
    number_sections: true
---


```{r, include = FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(
  collapse = TRUE,
  comment = "#>",
  fig.path = "man/figures/README-",
  out.width = "100%"
)
```


```{r child = 'vignettes/mixedML.Rmd'}
```


```{r child = 'vignettes/work_with_Python.Rmd'}
```
